title: Tight budget — escalation
description: Buyer minimize-cost intent with a budget set below the seller's likely floor. Both agents act in good faith; the math doesn't bridge. Demonstrates the escalation path to a human procurement officer with full audit.

expectedOutcome.likely: Escalates after 3 rounds. Buyer caps below seller's floor; gap ₹400+. Both agents write escalation audit JSON + .txt report.
expectedOutcome.possible: If Gemini takes a generous view, may close at the buyer's cap with seller signaling reluctance. Unlikely.
expectedOutcome.failureMode: Demonstrates the audit chain when the math doesn't allow a deal — useful for regulator-facing demos.

declaredButDeferred: sellerIntent (entirely — seller acts on its own .env config)
